source_pr.title: ddl: stabilize test TestParallelDDLBeforeRunDDLJob
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Close #18226

Problem Summary:

TestParallelDDLBeforeRunDDLJob may hang forever.

In OnGetInfoSchemaExported, there are two loops.
If the second session do `atomic.AddInt32(&sessionCnt, 1)`. Before `if atomic.LoadInt32(&sessionCnt) == 2 {`, the first session finish OnGetInfoSchemaExported and `atomic.StoreInt32(&sessionCnt, finishedCnt)`. Then the second session will block forever.

### What is changed and how it works?

Sleep a while.

### Related changes


- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->


- No code

Side effects



### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note

symptoms: TestParallelDDLBeforeRunDDLJob may hang forever due to a race between concurrent sessions around an atomic session counter.
failure_signature: TestParallelDDLBeforeRunDDLJob may hang forever due to a race between concurrent sessions around an atomic session counter.
root_cause_explanation: TestParallelDDLBeforeRunDDLJob had a race between two goroutines/sessions in OnGetInfoSchemaExported: if session 1 stores the finished value into the shared atomic counter before session 2 reaches the `sessionCnt==2` check, session 2 can loop forever and the test hangs. The fix adds a short sleep before storing the finished value to make sure the other session can pass the first loop.
fix_pattern: Add a short sleep before storing the finished session counter to avoid hanging in the OnGetInfoSchemaExported loop.

evidence: evidence: PR title: stabilize test TestParallelDDLBeforeRunDDLJob.
evidence: adds time.Sleep(100ms) with comment to avoid a loop waiting on atomic sessionCnt becoming true forever (ddl/db_change_test.go).
